configs.prompt: Describe this image in detail, including all visible objects, colors, and text.
Analyze this image and provide: 1) Main subject, 2) Colors used, 3) Text visible, 4) Purpose/context
Provide a brief 2-3 sentence description of this image.
Extract and list all visible text from this image, maintaining the original formatting where possible.
Describe this image in JSON format with keys: subject, colors, text_content, estimated_age_group, brand_visible
Provide description (just general descriptions) of this image in around 1000 tokens.
